# Sample Professional Evidence

Muhammad led product discovery for an AI-assisted professional identity platform that turns scattered documents into an evidence-backed profile.

He defined the multi-tenant data architecture, including private tenant source records, source versions, chunks, generated claims, and public profile materialization.

He insisted that public profile answers must cite approved public claims and must not retrieve private source documents, psychometric reports, journals, or raw source chunks.

The work demonstrates practical product architecture, AI safety judgement, evidence modeling, and delivery sequencing under cost constraints.
